Carol Williams

Email: carol.w@email.com | Portfolio: carolwilliams.dev

Summary:
Frontend developer with 5 years of experience building modern web interfaces. Specializes in React ecosystem and design systems.

Experience:

Senior Frontend Developer — DesignFirst Corp (2021–Present)
- Lead development of component library using React and TypeScript
- Implemented design systems with Storybook and Figma integration
- Optimized web performance achieving 95+ Lighthouse scores
- Managed state with Redux and React Query

Frontend Developer — MediaTech (2019–2021)
- Built responsive web applications with React and Vue.js
- Created CSS architectures using SASS and Tailwind
- Wrote end-to-end tests with Cypress and Playwright

Junior Developer — AgencyPro (2018–2019)
- Developed websites using HTML, CSS, JavaScript
- Built interactive UIs with jQuery and Bootstrap

Education:
B.A. Design & Technology, Parsons School of Design (2018)

Skills:
JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Vue.js, HTML, CSS, SASS, Tailwind, Storybook, Figma, Redux, Cypress, Playwright, Git, Webpack, Vite
